what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata only; no body content
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-b65508ac
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset

target board item content is not present locally
notes: A metadata stub that attaches board item item-b65508ac to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What does board item item-b65508ac contain?

intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a board item and a channel conversation or memory ledger.

contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a board item and a channel, supporting traceability from channel memory to board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record (att-1a933d9d) in the dragnet-development channel that targets board item item-b65508ac via a board:// URI and records an added timestamp.
